description:
Create a complete product backlog hierarchy in the TailwindTraders project consisting of 1 Epic, 2 Features, and 4 User Stories with proper parent-child links and story point estimates.

Hierarchy Requirements:
- Epic: 'Mobile App Experience' (Priority: 1, Description: 'Initiative to build a mobile-first shopping experience...')
- Feature: 'User Authentication' (Parent: Mobile App Experience, Priority: 1)
    - User Story: 'As a user, I want to log in with my email and password so that I can access my account' (Points: 5, Priority: 1)
    - User Story: 'As a user, I want to reset my password via email so that I can recover my account' (Points: 3, Priority: 2)
- Feature: 'Product Catalog Browsing' (Parent: Mobile App Experience, Priority: 2)
    - User Story: 'As a user, I want to browse products by category so that I can find items easily' (Points: 8, Priority: 1)
    - User Story: 'As a user, I want to search products by keyword so that I can quickly find specific items' (Points: 5, Priority: 2)

Ensure all hierarchy links (Parent/Child) are correctly established.
